answer: Democracy is a form of government system
text:
Review of "What is Democracy" Assignment

As a university professor, I would like to provide some feedback on your answer to the question "What is democracy". While your answer is correct in stating that democracy is a form of government system, there are a few things that can be added or removed to make your assignment the best it can be.

  • Provide a definition: In addition to stating that democracy is a form of government, it would be helpful to provide a clear and concise definition of what democracy means. This will help readers who may not be familiar with the term understand the concept better.
  • Explain the key principles of democracy: Democracy is not just a form of government, but it is also built on certain principles such as equality, freedom, and fairness. It would be beneficial to elaborate on these principles and how they are reflected in a democratic system.
